title: HSTMYFS 10 Pack Heavy Duty Garage Hooks with 2 Extension Cord Holder, Utility Steel Storage Hooks, Wall Mount Hooks & Tool Organiser Hanger, Hanging for Bike, Garden & Shed Tools, Ladder, Hose
features: Sturdy and Strong: Made from heavy-duty steel, these garage hooks can support up to 35kg. The double-hook design provides enhanced stability compared to single hooks, ensuring your items are securely held
Anti-Slip PVC Coating: Each hook features a PVC anti-slip coating that firmly holds your items in place while protecting them from scratches and damage

Versatile Sizes: This set includes 10 double hooks in 5 different sizes: 2 large square hooks, 2 large wave hooks, 2 small square hooks, 2 large J-hooks, and 2 small J-hooks. Additionally, 2 nylon extension cord holders are included to meet all your organisational needs

Easy Installation: The hooks come with two types of screws: deep-thread anchors for drywall and threaded anchors for wood, brick, and concrete walls. These screws are designed to be sturdy and resistant to splitting, ensuring a secure and easy installation

Multi-Purpose Organisation: Perfect for organising your garage, garden, shop, shed, or basement. These hooks are ideal for hanging ladders, cleaning tools, gardening equipment, power tools, bicycles, and more, helping you maximise space and keep everything in order

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎High strength, unique double arm hook design for balanced and stable strength, Uv Resistant, Reusable, Heavy Duty, Non Slip, Rust Resistant
